name: Evenflow Water Saver Valves
description: Evenflow Water Saver Valves are self-closing taps designed for use at low water pressures.

taxonomy.sub_category: Evenflow Water Saver Valves Updated on January 10, 2024 · Created on August 20, 2017 Evenflow Water Saver Valves Evenflow Water Saver Valves are self-closing taps designed for use at low water pressures. Developed By Evenproducts Tested By Evenflow Water Saver Valves Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The Evenflow Water Saver Valve is a spring-assisted self-closing tap that does not drip when remaining idle. The product is designed so that the user’s hand does not contaminate the water flowing. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Community, NGOs Distributors / Implementing Organizations Evenproducts is a member of the UK government's Rapid Response Facility Network. Their distribution partners include WASH agencies like Oxfam, Water Mission, and Medicins Sans Frontieres. Regions Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America Manufacturing/Building Method The product is mass manufactured in Eversham, in the United Kingdom. Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model The product is largely distributed by humanitarian organizations. Individuals can obtain the product by directly contacting the manufacturer. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Activation mechanism Handle Maximum flowrate (L/min) 12 L/min (0.5 m head), 14.6 L/min (1 m head), 41.3 L/min (8 m head) Material Stainless Steel Design Specifications The Everflow valve is made from food-grade materials. It has a large internal passage to avoid blockage by small stones, reliable spring assisted closing and requires low maintenance. This product uses spring-assisted closing with a 3/4” BSP F connection. The taps weigh 171 grams and have a length of 80 mm. The main body is light and robust. Technical Support Technical support provided by Evenproducts. Replacement Components Available from the manufacturer. Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The manufacturer specified performance targets include no water drip between uses and adequate flow rate at low pressures. Vetted Performance Status No third party testing. Safety No known safety hazards are related to this product. Complementary Technical Systems Complementary technical systems include water storage tanks, connection kits, and installation tool kits. Available: https://www.iso.org/standard/46486.html Compliance with regulations Evenproducts is an ISO9001:2008-accredited company. Evaluation methods No third-party has tested this product. Other Information The company produces products to assist in water, sanitation, and hygiene. Evenproducts also produces a wide range of latrines .
